CUPHEAD: Boss Battle

Battle through intense boss fights as Cuphead in this run-and-gun action game! Face off against a challenging boss with multiple attack patterns. Dodge projectiles, jump over obstacles, and shoot your way to victory. Defeat the boss before your health runs out to win. Master the timing and movement to survive increasingly difficult attack waves!

Arrow Keys: Move left/right and jump (up arrow) | Z Key: Shoot projectiles at the boss | Space: Dash (quick dodge with brief invincibility) | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (return to start screen) | ENTER: Start game

Expose this in a variable called `gameState.gamePhase` where `gameState` is a global object accessible via `window.getGameState()`. - Start screen should have a title, short description of the game, instructions to play the game, and a "PRESS ENTER TO START" prompt. - Allowed libraries: p5.js, p5.collide2D - Canvas: `600 × 400 px`; target 60 FPS - Keyboard inputs only. No mouse control. - Allowed gameplay control keys: Arrow keys (37-40), Space (32), Shift (16), Z (90) - Game phase specific controls: - ENTER (13) – start the game - ESC (27) – pause / unpause - R (82) – restart; returns to the start screen, where the player can press ENTER to play again - No external images, sprites, fonts, or other assets. Make visual assets and animations using code. - No audio or sound effects. - Use p5.js in instance mode and expose the game instance globally as window.gameInstance. - Ensure game reproducibility using `p.randomSeed(42)` in the `setup` function. No other random seeding. - Use ES6 syntax with proper imports and exports at the top of the file where they are used. No dynamic imports or require() imports. - Maintain `p.logs` as write-only; log game_info, inputs, player_info with proper initialization and updates during the game loop. Expand the game concept with new game elements with a well-planned progression and learning curve that enables the player to learn about the game elements and mechanics. No Node.js style require imports. CUPHEAD: Boss Battle

Battle through intense boss fights as Cuphead in this run-and-gun action game! Face off against a challenging boss with multiple attack patterns. Dodge projectiles, jump over obstacles, and shoot your way to victory. Defeat the boss before your health runs out to win. Master the timing and movement to survive increasingly difficult attack waves!

Arrow Keys: Move left/right and jump (up arrow) | Z Key: Shoot projectiles at the boss | Space: Dash (quick dodge with brief invincibility) | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (return to start screen) | ENTER: Start game
